tagline: Auckland residential builder specialising in new builds and full renovations
description: Kallisto Construction Ltd is a licensed Auckland building company based in East Tamaki, serving homeowners across South and East Auckland. We specialise in residential new builds, whole-home renovations, and extensions. Our team of LBP-licensed builders brings a no-surprises approach to every project — detailed quotes, clear timelines, and quality workmanship backed by the Building Act warranties.
known_for: Full-service Auckland construction company specialising in residential new builds, renovations, and extensions.
